ddls:
CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the product */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the product (e.g., beans, beets) */,
  "price" REAL /* Regular price of the product */,
  "salePrice" REAL /* Sale price of the product (if applicable) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the product */,
  "inStock" INTEGER /* Number of products in stock */,
  "seedCount" INTEGER /* Number of seeds per packet */,
  "daysToMaturity" INTEGER /* Number of days to maturity */,
  "avgReview" REAL /* Average customer review rating */,
  "numReviews" INTEGER /* Number of customer reviews */,
  "isNew" INTEGER /* Whether the product is new or not */,
  "productImage" TEXT /* URL of the product image */,
  "productSpecification" TEXT /* Additional product specifications */,
  "productViews" INTEGER /* Number of product views */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "categoryImage" TEXT /* URL of the category image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who made the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was made */,
  "total" REAL /* Total cost of the order */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., pending, shipped, delivered) */,
  "shippingAddressId" INTEGER /* ID of the shipping address */,
  "statusUpdateDate" TEXT /* Date and time of the order status update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_shippingAddressId FOREIGN KEY ("shippingAddressId") REFERENCES shipping_addresses ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order that the item belongs to */,
  "product_id" TEXT /* ID of the product that was ordered */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product that was ordered */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product at the time of the order */,
  "subtotal" REAL /* Subtotal of the order item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the customer (hashed for security) */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "phoneNumber" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "dob" TEXT /* Date of birth of the customer */,
  "preferredPaymentMethod" TEXT /* Preferred payment method of the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "product_id" TEXT /* ID of the product that was reviewed */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who left the review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the customer (1-5) */,
  "review" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "reviewTitle" TEXT /* Title of the review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loyalty_program" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each loyalty program entry */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who is part of the loyalty program */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Number of points the customer has earned */,
  "last_purchase_date" TEXT /* Date of the customer's last purchase */,
  "loyaltyTier" TEXT /* Loyalty tier of the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loyalty_program_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payment_methods" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment method */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who owns the payment method */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Type of payment method (e.g., credit card, PayPal) */,
  "payment_info" TEXT /* Details of the payment method (e.g., credit card number, PayPal email) */,
  "payment_provider" TEXT /* Payment provider (e.g., Stripe, PayPal) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payment_methods_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shipping_addresses" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shipping address */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who owns the shipping address */,
  "address" TEXT /* Shipping address */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the shipping address */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the shipping address */,
  "zipCode" TEXT /* Zip code of the shipping address */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the shipping address */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shipping_addresses_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coupons" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coupon */,
  "code" TEXT /* Code that the customer must enter to use the coupon */,
  "discount" REAL /* Discount amount or percentage */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Date when the coupon expires */,
  "couponType" TEXT /* Type of coupon (e.g., percentage off, fixed amount off) */,
  "minPurchaseRequired" REAL /* Minimum purchase required to use the coupon */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coupon_redemptions" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coupon redemption */,
  "coupon_id" INTEGER /* ID of the coupon that was redeemed */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who redeemed the coupon */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order that the coupon was redeemed for */,
  "redemption_date" TEXT /* Date when the coupon was redeemed */,
  "redemptionAmount" REAL /* Amount of the coupon redemption */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_coupon_redemptions_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_coupon_redemptions_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_coupon_redemptions_coupon_id FOREIGN KEY ("coupon_id") REFERENCES coupons ("id")
)
